identity.name: Flixz
identity.archetype: Jewel & Luxury mixed with Electric & Neon

headings.usage: Main titles, Movie names, Section headers

grids.movie_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-neon rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.movie_poster: relative group overflow-hidden rounded-xl aspect-[2/3] transition-transform duration-300 hover:z-10 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-2xl border border-white/5
cards.glass_panel: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6

inputs.search: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all w-full backdrop-blur-sm

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-20 bg-black/90 border-r border-white/5 flex flex-col items-center py-8 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl
navigation.topbar: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full h-16 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/80 to-transparent z-40 flex items-center px-8 backdrop-blur-sm

backgrounds.description: Golden light flares on dark background for cinematic hero sections
Red glowing eye abstract for login/signup background

general: Implement the 'Anti-AI' aesthetic: Avoid generic centered layouts.
Use the 'Tetris' grid for the dashboard home page.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states with 'text-white' and 'scale-105'.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors like 'bg-slate-900'. Use the custom hex codes provided.
For the Watch Party, use a split-screen layout. Video player takes priority.
Use 'framer-motion' for the 3D carousel effect in the hero section.

do_not: Do NOT use 'Inter' font for headings.
Do NOT use purple gradients on white backgrounds.
Do NOT use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use cinematic placeholder text.
must_do: MUST use 'data-testid' for all interactive elements.
MUST ensure contrast ratios are accessible (WCAG AA).
